message:
refactor(resize): delegate scheduler invariant checking to centralized contract functions

Replace inline per-pane invariant checking in
ResizeScheduler::check_invariants() with calls to the centralized
check_scheduler_snapshot_invariants() and
check_lifecycle_event_invariants() functions from resize_invariants.

This eliminates duplicated validation logic between the scheduler's
own check method and the standalone invariant module, ensuring a single
source of truth for the scheduler invariant contract.

Also removes a redundant mark_active_phase(Preparing) call in the
lifecycle event test — the scheduler transitions directly from
scheduled to Reflowing per the updated phase model.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
